action_plan: Log tonight's weight first thing tomorrow morning to re-anchor the glide path.
Enter today's food retroactively if possible, or commit to real-time logging tomorrow against the 3100 kcal / 215P / 400C / 66F target.
Sync sleep and HRV data before tomorrow's session so readiness can actually be judged.
If a gym session was scheduled today and missed, don't stack it onto tomorrow — resume the normal split fresh rather than doubling volume.
Log tomorrow's gym session in Hevy immediately after training to restore the 0/4 adherence count.
